description: You are a flight instructor planning a multi-day VFR scenic tour of the Pacific Northwest for a group of student pilots. With the VFR Sectional chart display active, create a flight plan named PNW_TOUR that includes the following waypoints: KSEA (Seattle-Tacoma), KPDX (Portland), KEUG (Eugene), and KMFR (Medford/Rogue Valley). Save the flight plan as PNW_TOUR.csv.
